summary: Completed testing of Day Management features: Cash withdrawal function, day opening with previous day balance display, and day closing with expected balance calculation. All 10 backend API tests passed. All 10 frontend features verified via Playwright.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement needed

passed_tests: Day Management page - 'Nap nincs nyitva' status displays when day is closed (verified as 'Nap lezárva' with lock icon)
Day Management page - Opening day form with balance input works
Day Management page - After opening day, stats cards appear (autók, bevétel, készpénz, kártya)
Day Management page - Napzárás section shows: opening balance, cash income, cash withdrawals, expected closing balance
Day Management page - 'Új kivétel' button opens cash withdrawal dialog
Day Management page - Cash withdrawal dialog has amount (Összeg) and reason (Indoklás) fields
Day Management page - Saving withdrawal updates the withdrawals list and expected closing balance
Day Management page - Withdrawal list shows reason, user, time, and amount
Day Management page - Close day button and confirmation dialog work
Day Management page - Previous day closing balance shown when opening new day (Előző nap záró egyenlege)
Backend API - GET /day-records/today returns current day record
Backend API - GET /day-records returns list of day records with closed records for previous day balance
Backend API - POST /day-records/withdraw creates withdrawal with id, amount, reason, user, timestamp
Backend API - POST /day-records/withdraw fails with 400 when day is closed
Backend API - POST /day-records/open fails with 400 when day already open
Backend API - POST /day-records/close fails with 400 when no open day
seed_data_creation: Created test withdrawals during testing (Test withdrawal - pytest: 1,000 Ft, Test withdrawal from Playwright: 2,000 Ft). Day was closed and reopened with 50,000 Ft opening balance.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 12 tested Day Management cash register features. Day is currently OPEN with 50,000 Ft opening balance at Debrecen location. Features verified: 1) Cash withdrawal dialog with amount/reason fields, 2) Withdrawal list showing reason/user/time/amount, 3) Expected closing balance calculation includes withdrawals, 4) Previous day closing balance display when opening new day, 5) Day open/close status indicators, 6) Close day confirmation dialog. All backend APIs working: /day-records/today, /day-records, /day-records/open, /day-records/close, /day-records/withdraw.
